explanation_ru: May/might have + V3 выражает возможность о прошлом: She might have forgotten. Для будущего используем may/might + V1.
formula: may/might + V1; may/might have + V3

examples.en: This grammar point is useful in real conversation.
examples.ru: Эта грамматика нужна в живой речи.
examples.note: Смотри правило и примеры в уроке.

examples.en: Compare the correct form with the wrong form.
Use the form only when the meaning fits.
examples.ru: Используй форму только когда подходит смысл.
examples.note: В B1/B2 важен не перевод, а оттенок.

common_mistakes.wrong: I use the form only because it sounds familiar.
common_mistakes.correct: I choose the form because of the meaning.
common_mistakes.explanation: На B1/B2 важно выбирать время/конструкцию по смыслу.

common_mistakes.correct: I keep the auxiliary pattern fixed.
common_mistakes.explanation: Will, have, be, do, modals имеют разные схемы.

common_mistakes.wrong: I translate Russian word order directly.
common_mistakes.correct: I use English word order and English tense logic.
common_mistakes.explanation: Многие ошибки идут от прямого перевода с русского.

questions.question: Next year I ___ drive.
questions.explanation_correct: Future ability требует be able to.

questions.question: When I was young, I ___ run fast.
You ___ called me.
questions.explanation_correct: Мог бы позвонить, но не позвонил.

questions.question: You worked all day. You ___ tired.

explanation_ru: Have to часто показывает обязанность из-за правил, работы или обстоятельств. Must часто звучит как личное сильное требование или правило говорящего. В вопросах и отрицаниях have to использует do/does/did. Mustn't = нельзя, don't have to = не нужно.
formula:
have to + V1
must + V1
don't have to = не нужно
mustn't = нельзя

questions.question: Do you ___ get up early?
questions.explanation_correct: В вопросе с do используем have to.

questions.question: You ___ touch this button. It's dangerous.

explanation_wrong.don't have to: Don't have to = не нужно, не запрет.

questions.question: I ___ go now. It's not necessary.
Yesterday I ___ work until midnight.
questions.explanation_correct: Past of have to = had to.

questions.question: We didn't ___ pay.
questions.explanation_correct: После didn't нужна V1: have to.

explanation_ru: Must = нужно/обязан. Mustn't = нельзя, строгий запрет. Needn't = нет необходимости, можно не делать. Needn't часто звучит формальнее, чем don't have to.
formula:
must + V1
mustn't + V1
needn't + V1

questions.question: We ___ hurry. We have lots of time.
Students ___ use phones during the exam.

explanation_ru: Should используется для совета, мнения о правильном действии и ожидания. После should глагол всегда в обычной форме без to.
formula:
should + V1
shouldn't + V1

examples.ru: Тебе не стоит так много работать.

explanation_wrong.do: Не do not be в этом значении.

explanation_ru: Should также может означать ожидание: что-то вероятно случится, потому что это нормально/логично. The train should be here soon = поезд должен скоро быть здесь, скорее всего.
formula:
should + V1 = expected/probable
should have + V3 = should in the past / criticism

questions.question: They should ___ by now.
questions.explanation_correct: By now often should have + V3.

explanation_ru: Had better означает «лучше бы», часто с предупреждением о плохом результате. It's time + past form означает, что уже пора что-то сделать: It's time we left.
formula:
had better + V1
had better not + V1
It's time + subject + Past Simple

common_mistakes.wrong: You'd better not to tell him.

common_mistakes.explanation: После It's time обычно past form.

explanation_ru: Would используется для вежливых просьб, воображаемых ситуаций, предпочтений и повторяющихся действий в прошлом. Часто встречается в I'd like, would you mind, would rather.
formula:
would + V1
would like to + V1
would rather + V1

examples.en: When we were children, we would play outside.
examples.ru: В детстве мы часто играли на улице.

common_mistakes.correct: I would go / I'd like to go.
common_mistakes.explanation: После would нет to, кроме would like to.

explanation_wrong.will: Will like = буду любить/понравится, не просьба.

questions.question: Choose correct.
options: I'd like to ask a question.
I would to ask a question.
questions.correct_answer: I'd like to ask a question.

questions.question: When he was young, he ___ walk for hours.

title_ru: Can / could / would: просьбы и разрешение
explanation_ru: Для просьб, предложений, разрешения и приглашений используются can, could, would. Could звучит вежливее, would you like — приглашение/предложение.
formula:
Can/Could I...?
Can/Could you...?
Would you like...?
Do you mind if I...?

examples.ru: Не могли бы вы мне помочь?

common_mistakes.correct: Would you like a drink? / Would you like to drink?

common_mistakes.wrong: Do you mind if I to sit here?
common_mistakes.correct: Do you mind if I sit here?

questions.question: Do you mind if I ___ here?
Choose correct.
options: Could I to borrow your pen?

explanation_wrong.many: Many with countable plural.

title_ru: If I do / if I did
explanation_ru: First conditional говорит о реальном будущем: If I have time, I'll help. Second conditional говорит о нереальной/маловероятной ситуации: If I had time, I would help.
formula:
First: if + Present, will + V1
Second: if + Past, would + V1

examples.en: If it rains, we'll stay home.
If I had more time, I would learn French.
examples.ru: Если бы было больше времени, я бы учил французский.

examples.en: If I were you, I wouldn't do that.
examples.ru: На твоём месте я бы так не делал.

common_mistakes.wrong: If it will rain, we'll stay home.
common_mistakes.correct: If it rains, we'll stay home.
common_mistakes.explanation: No will after if in first conditional.

common_mistakes.wrong: If I have more time, I would learn French.
common_mistakes.correct: If I had more time, I would learn French.

questions.question: If I had money, I ___ buy it.
If I ___ you, I would wait.
I'll call you if I ___ time.
What would you do if you ___ your job?
Choose correct.
options: If I knew, I would tell you.
If I know, I would tell you.
If I would know, I told you.
questions.correct_answer: If I knew, I would tell you.

questions.question: If you don't hurry, you ___ miss the train.

topic: if I knew I wish I knew
title_ru: If I knew / I wish I knew
explanation_ru: I wish + Past Simple выражает сожаление о настоящем: I wish I knew = жаль, что я не знаю. If I knew используется в second conditional.
formula:
I wish + Past Simple
If + Past Simple, would + V1

examples.en: I wish I knew the answer.
examples.ru: Жаль, что я не знаю ответ.

examples.en: If I knew the answer, I would tell you.
examples.ru: Если бы я знал ответ, я бы сказал.

examples.en: I wish I could speak Spanish.
examples.ru: Жаль, что я не говорю по-испански.

common_mistakes.explanation: После wish о настоящем используем past form.

common_mistakes.wrong: If I would know, I would tell you.
common_mistakes.correct: If I knew, I would tell you.

questions.question: If I ___ the answer, I would tell you.
If she ___ here, she would help.
If we lived closer, we ___ meet more often.
Choose correct.
options: I wish I had more time.
I wish I have more time.
I wish I would have more time.
questions.correct_answer: I wish I had more time.

Would обычно не с same subject для желания о себе.

title_ru: If I had known / I wish I had known
explanation_ru: Third conditional говорит о нереальном прошлом: If I had known, I would have helped. I wish I had known = жаль, что я не знал тогда.
formula:
If + Past Perfect, would have + V3
I wish + Past Perfect

examples.en: If I had known, I would have helped.
examples.ru: Если бы я знал, я бы помог.

examples.en: I wish I had studied harder.
examples.ru: Жаль, что я не учился усерднее.

examples.en: She would have come if you had invited her.
examples.ru: Она бы пришла, если бы ты её пригласил.

common_mistakes.wrong: If I knew, I would have helped.
common_mistakes.correct: If I had known, I would have helped.
common_mistakes.explanation: Для нереального прошлого нужен Past Perfect.

common_mistakes.correct: I wish I had known earlier.

common_mistakes.wrong: Would have helped if I would have known.
common_mistakes.correct: I would have helped if I had known.

questions.question: If I had known, I ___ helped.
If she ___ earlier, she would have met him.

explanation_wrong.arrived: Past Simple не для third conditional.

explanation_wrong.studied: Wish about present/habit, не past regret.

questions.question: They would have won if they ___ better.
If you had told me, I ___ come.
Choose correct.
options: If I had seen you, I would have said hello.
If I saw you, I would have said hello.
If I would have seen you, I had said hello.
questions.correct_answer: If I had seen you, I would have said hello.

questions.question: She wouldn't have been late if she ___ earlier.

explanation_ru: Wish используется для сожаления о настоящем, прошлом или раздражения. I wish I knew = жаль, что не знаю. I wish I had known = жаль, что не знал. I wish you would stop = хочу, чтобы ты перестал.
formula:
I wish + Past Simple = present regret
I wish + Past Perfect = past regret
I wish + would + V1 = annoyance/wanted change

examples.en: I wish I lived near the sea.
examples.ru: Жаль, что я не живу у моря.

examples.en: I wish I hadn't said that.

common_mistakes.wrong: I wish I live near the sea.
common_mistakes.correct: I wish I lived near the sea.

common_mistakes.wrong: I wish I didn't say that yesterday.
common_mistakes.correct: I wish I hadn't said that yesterday.

common_mistakes.wrong: I wish I would have more money.
common_mistakes.correct: I wish I had more money.
common_mistakes.explanation: Wish about own present state uses Past Simple.

explanation_wrong.stopped: Could be present regret, but request is would stop.
Could mean regret, but for annoyance/change use would.

questions.question: Choose correct.
options: I wish I will can drive.

explanation_ru: Passive используется, когда важнее действие или объект, а не исполнитель. Present passive: is/are done. Past passive: was/were done.
formula:
am/is/are + V3
was/were + V3

examples.en: The room is cleaned every day.

title_ru: Passive 2: be done / been done / being done
explanation_ru: Passive может использоваться после модальных глаголов, в perfect и continuous. Be done после will/can/must. Been done после have/has. Being done показывает процесс сейчас.
formula:
modal + be + V3
have/has been + V3
am/is/are being + V3

examples.en: The work must be finished today.

explanation_ru: В пассиве важно правильно выбирать время: was done, is being done, has been done, had been done, will be done. Выбор времени такой же, как в active, но добавляется be + V3.
formula:
tense of be + V3
had been + V3
will have been + V3

examples.en: The room had been cleaned before we arrived.
examples.ru: Комната была убрана до нашего прихода.

examples.en: The project will be completed soon.

questions.question: The room had ___ cleaned before we arrived.
By Friday, it will have ___ finished.
The building was ___ when I passed.
The problem is unlikely to ___ solved quickly.

topic: it is said he is supposed
title_ru: It is said that / he is said to / supposed to
explanation_ru: Эти пассивные структуры используются для слухов, сообщений и ожиданий: It is said that..., He is said to..., He is supposed to... Supposed to часто означает «считается/ожидается/должен по плану».
formula:
It is said that + clause
subject is said to + V1 / to have V3
be supposed to + V1

examples.en: It is said that he is rich.
He is said to be rich.
You are supposed to be here at 9.

common_mistakes.wrong: He is said that he is rich.
common_mistakes.correct: It is said that he is rich / He is said to be rich.
He is said to be rich.

questions.question: ___ said that he is very rich.

explanation_wrong.He is: He is said to..., не that.

explanation_wrong.that he is: Другая структура: It is said that.

questions.question: The painting is said ___ worth millions.

explanation_wrong.that it is: Use It is said that it is.

explanation_wrong.for: Wrong.

questions.question: Choose correct.
options: It is said that the hotel is haunted.
It said that the hotel is haunted.
The hotel is said that haunted.
questions.correct_answer: It is said that the hotel is haunted.

explanation_ru: Have/get something done означает, что кто-то делает это для тебя или с твоей вещью: I had my hair cut = мне подстригли волосы. Это не значит, что я сам подстриг.
formula: have/get + object + V3

examples.en: We are having the house painted.

common_mistakes.wrong: I cut my hair at the salon.
common_mistakes.correct: I had my hair cut at the salon.
common_mistakes.explanation: Если мастер подстриг, have something done.

questions.question: I had my hair ___.
questions.explanation_correct: Have something done uses V3; cut-cut-cut.

questions.question: I need to have my phone ___.
Where did you have your eyes ___?

explanation_ru: Reported speech передаёт чужие слова. Часто tense сдвигается назад: am/is → was, present simple → past simple, will → would, can → could. Say не требует объекта, tell требует объект.
formula:
said that + clause
told + person + that
backshift: is→was, do→did, will→would

examples.en: He said that he was tired.
She told me she couldn't come.
examples.ru: Она сказала мне, что не сможет прийти.

common_mistakes.wrong: He said me he was tired.
common_mistakes.correct: He told me he was tired / He said he was tired.

common_mistakes.wrong: She told that she was busy.
common_mistakes.correct: She said that she was busy / She told me that...

questions.question: Choose correct.
options: He told me he was ill.
He said me he was ill.
He told to me he was ill.
questions.correct_answer: He told me he was ill.

explanation_ru: В reported questions порядок слов становится прямым: He asked where I lived, не where did I live. Yes/no questions передаются через if/whether. Команды: told/asked + object + to + verb.
formula:
asked + question word + subject + verb
asked if/whether + subject + verb
told/asked + object + to + V1

examples.en: She asked if I was tired.

common_mistakes.wrong: He asked where did I live.

common_mistakes.correct: She asked if I was tired.

questions.question: He asked me where I ___ from.
Choose correct.
options: She asked me if I knew Tom.
She asked me did I know Tom.
She asked me if did I know Tom.
questions.correct_answer: She asked me if I knew Tom.

explanation_ru: В английском вопрос обычно требует вспомогательного глагола: do/does/did, be, have или modal. Нельзя просто поменять интонацию, как в русском.
formula:
auxiliary + subject + main verb?
question word + auxiliary + subject + verb?

explanation_wrong.did break: Did not needed when who is subject.

explanation_ru: В embedded questions после Do you know..., Can you tell me..., I don't know... порядок слов прямой: where he lives, what it means. Не используем do/does/did внутри второй части.
formula:
Do you know + question word + subject + verb?
I don't know + question word + subject + verb

examples.en: Do you know where she lives?
I don't know what it means.
examples.ru: Я не знаю, что это значит.

examples.en: Can you tell me where the station is?

common_mistakes.wrong: Do you know where does she live?
common_mistakes.correct: Do you know where she lives?

common_mistakes.wrong: I don't know what does it mean.
common_mistakes.correct: I don't know what it means.

common_mistakes.wrong: Can you tell me where is the station?
common_mistakes.correct: Can you tell me where the station is?

questions.question: Can you tell me where the bank ___?
I don't know where they ___.
questions.explanation_correct: No did in embedded past question.

questions.question: Could you tell me how much it ___?
Choose correct.
options: Do you know where he works?
Do you know where does he work?
Do you know where works he?
questions.correct_answer: Do you know where he works?

questions.question: I don't know why she ___ angry.

title_ru: Auxiliary verbs: I think so / I hope so
explanation_ru: В коротких ответах и фразах можно использовать auxiliary вместо повторения всей фразы: Yes, I do. I think so. I hope not. So do I.
formula:
short answers use auxiliary
I think so / I hope not
So + auxiliary + subject

examples.en: Do you like coffee? Yes, I do.
Will it rain? I think so.
I like it. So do I.

explanation_ru: Question tags — короткие хвостики в конце фразы: isn't it?, do you?, haven't they? Обычно positive sentence + negative tag, negative sentence + positive tag.
formula:
positive statement + negative tag
negative statement + positive tag
use same auxiliary

explanation_wrong.can you: Same polarity question, not standard tag.

explanation_ru: После некоторых глаголов используется -ing: enjoy, mind, finish, stop, avoid, suggest, consider. После предлогов тоже обычно -ing.
formula: enjoy/mind/finish/avoid/suggest + V-ing

explanation_ru: После многих глаголов используется to + verb: decide, hope, plan, promise, refuse, offer, agree, learn, manage, forget.
formula: decide/hope/plan/promise/refuse/agree + to + V1

questions.question: I forgot ___ the email.
questions.explanation_correct: Forget to do = не вспомнил сделать.

explanation_ru: После want, ask, tell, expect, help, would like часто идёт object + to + verb: I want you to listen. He told me to wait.
formula: want/ask/tell/expect/would like + object + to + V1

common_mistakes.wrong: We asked to him to help.

title_ru: Verb + -ing or to 1: remember, regret, go on
explanation_ru: Некоторые глаголы меняют смысл: remember doing = помнить, что сделал; remember to do = не забыть сделать. Regret doing = жалеть о сделанном; regret to say = с сожалением сообщать.
formula:
remember doing / remember to do
regret doing / regret to say
go on doing / go on to do

common_mistakes.wrong: Remember locking the door before you leave.
common_mistakes.correct: Remember to lock the door before you leave.

common_mistakes.explanation: If you regret your own past action, use -ing.

common_mistakes.wrong: I remember to meet him yesterday.

questions.question: Remember ___ the lights before you leave.

explanation_wrong.turning off: Это значило бы помнить прошлое действие.

questions.question: We regret ___ you that the flight is cancelled.
questions.explanation_correct: Regret to inform = с сожалением сообщаем.

explanation_wrong.informing: Значило бы жалеть о процессе информирования.

questions.question: He went on ___ for two hours.

explanation_wrong.to talk: Go on to do = перейти к другому действию.

questions.question: After maths, he went on ___ physics.
questions.explanation_correct: Go on to do = перейти к следующему действию.

explanation_wrong.studying: Continue studying same thing would be -ing.

Forgot doing = забыл факт прошлого действия.

questions.question: I'll never forget ___ Paris for the first time.

title_ru: Verb + -ing or to 2: try, need, help
explanation_ru: Try to do = попытаться сделать. Try doing = попробовать способ. Need to do = нужно сделать. Need doing = нужно, чтобы это сделали с предметом. Help может быть help do или help to do.
formula:
try to do / try doing
need to do / need doing
help do / help to do

examples.en: I tried to open the door.

common_mistakes.wrong: I tried opening the door but couldn't.
common_mistakes.correct: I tried to open the door but couldn't.
common_mistakes.explanation: Если попытался и не смог — try to.

common_mistakes.correct: The car needs washing / needs to be washed.

questions.question: I tried ___ the window, but it was stuck.

explanation_wrong.opening: Try a method, less suitable with couldn't.

explanation_wrong.practising: Need doing has passive object meaning.

questions.question: Choose correct.
questions.explanation_correct: Needs cleaning = needs to be cleaned.

questions.question: I tried ___ early, but I couldn't sleep.

explanation_wrong.sleeping: Try sleeping = try the method of sleeping, less logical here.

title_ru: Verb + -ing or to 3: like / would like
explanation_ru: Like doing часто говорит об удовольствии или привычке. Like to do может говорить о выборе/предпочтении в ситуации. Would like всегда требует to + verb.
formula:
like doing / like to do
would like to + V1
wouldn't like to + V1

examples.en: I like to check my emails in the morning.

common_mistakes.correct: I like swimming / I like to swim.

questions.question: I wouldn't like ___ in that area.
I like ___ everything before I leave.
questions.explanation_correct: Like to do can mean preference/routine.

explanation_wrong.checking: Also possible, but to better for deliberate habit.

explanation_ru: Prefer может использоваться с -ing или to. Would rather используется без to: I'd rather stay. Для сравнения: prefer doing to doing, would rather do than do.
formula:
prefer + noun/-ing/to + V1
prefer doing to doing
would rather + V1
would rather do than do

examples.en: I prefer driving to travelling by train.
examples.ru: Я предпочитаю водить, а не ехать поездом.

common_mistakes.correct: I prefer driving to travelling / I prefer to drive rather than travel.

explanation_wrong.from: Wrong.

questions.question: I prefer ___ to travelling by bus.
I'd rather walk ___ take a taxi.

explanation_wrong.from: Wrong.

questions.question: Choose correct.
options: I prefer living alone to sharing a flat.
I prefer living alone than sharing a flat.
I prefer live alone to share a flat.
questions.correct_answer: I prefer living alone to sharing a flat.

questions.question: I would rather not ___ about it.

explanation_ru: После предлога глагол принимает форму -ing: after doing, before going, without saying, by doing, instead of doing, interested in doing.
formula: preposition + V-ing

examples.en: After finishing work, I went home.
examples.ru: После окончания работы я пошёл домой.

questions.question: You can improve by ___ every day.
Choose correct.
options: Instead of going home, we stayed out.
Instead of to go home, we stayed out.
Instead go home, we stayed out.
questions.correct_answer: Instead of going home, we stayed out.

topic: be used to / get used to
title_ru: Be used to / get used to
explanation_ru: be used to + V-ing = быть привыкшим; get used to + V-ing = привыкать. Не путать с used to + V1 = раньше делал.
formula: be/get used to + noun/V-ing

examples.en: I'm used to getting up early.
examples.note: Обрати внимание на форму после ключевого слова.

examples.en: She is getting used to living abroad.
I used to smoke, but I stopped.
examples.note: В B1/B2 важно выбирать форму по смыслу.

common_mistakes.explanation: Типичная ошибка в этой теме: используется неправильная форма.
Здесь важно соблюдать устойчивую грамматическую схему.
Ошибка появляется из-за прямого перевода с русского или путаницы форм.

questions.question: I'm used to ___ early.
questions.explanation_correct: Верно: эта форма соответствует правилу урока.

explanation_wrong.get up: Этот вариант нарушает схему темы или даёт другой смысл.
explanation_wrong.to get up: Этот вариант не подходит по форме/числу/артиклю для этой конструкции.

questions.question: She is getting used to ___ abroad.
questions.explanation_correct: Верно: эта форма соответствует правилу урока.

explanation_wrong.live: Этот вариант нарушает схему темы или даёт другой смысл.

explanation_wrong.up: Этот вариант нарушает схему темы или даёт другой смысл.
explanation_wrong.in: Этот вариант не подходит по форме, предлогу или смыслу.
